channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Senate President Gatchalian urges Marcos to outline economic recovery plans in upcoming SONA

item.title: Tanzania Invests Sh203 Billion in Mtwara Electrification Project
item.description: The Tanzanian government has allocated Sh203 billion to advance electrification efforts in Mtwara Region, aiming to improve energy access and stimulate economic growth. The project, part of broader in...

item.title: Ukraine's Military Leadership Faces Major Changes as Zelensky Dismisses Key Officials
item.description: President Volodymyr Zelensky has removed General Oleksandr Syrsky, the commander of Ukraine's armed forces, as part of a broader reshuffling of military leadership. This follows the abrupt dismissal o...

item.title: UK Government Fails to Protect Ecosystems Amid Poultry Industry Lobbying
item.description: The article critiques the UK government's failure to protect ecosystems from the damaging effects of industrial poultry farming, driven by corporate lobbying. It highlights the absence of an environme...

item.title: Gayton McKenzie challenges Western Cape forensic investigation into Central Karoo fundraising campaign

item.title: Legacy of Ike Ekweremadu's Political Machine in Enugu State
item.description: Four years after Ike Ekweremadu's London arrest, his political network in Enugu State has fragmented. Governor Peter Mbah is now scrambling to secure votes ahead of the 2027 elections amid growing opp...

item.title: Government Allocates P22.7 Billion Savings to Assist Filipinos Affected by Middle East Crisis
item.description: Malacañang announced that the government has accumulated P22.7 billion in savings to aid Filipinos impacted by the Middle East conflict. Palace Press Officer Claire Castro explained that these funds, ...

item.title: Ex-Girlfriend of Comedian Mluo Leaks Chat Evidence of Alleged Infidelity
item.description: Belle, ex-girlfriend of Kenyan comedian Mluo, has sparked social media controversy by sharing WhatsApp chats that allegedly prove Mluo cheated during their relationship. In a video posted on Instagram...

item.title: The Interconnected Challenges of Modern Governance
item.description: The article explores the evolving dynamics between economic systems, political frameworks, and societal structures in shaping global leadership. It emphasizes the need for collaboration between govern...

item.title: Trump's 50% Tariffs Threaten Key Canadian Sectors and Provinces
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump’s latest trade measures pose significant risks to Canada’s economy, with a 50% tariff on over $12 billion in Canadian exports set to take effect on August 19, 2026. The tar...

item.title: Bunnik Tours' South American Small-Group Adventure: A Seamless Journey Through Peru, Brazil, and Argentina
item.description: This article details Bunnik Tours' comprehensive small-group tour of South America, emphasizing safety, comfort, and meticulous planning. The itinerary spans Peru, Brazil, and Argentina, with a focus ...

item.title: US Imposes 200% Tariffs on Generic Drugs, Concerns for Indian Exports
item.description: The article discusses the announcement by U.S. President Donald Trump of a new tariff policy on generic pharmaceuticals, which could significantly impact India's economy. Starting from August 2028, ge...

item.title: Gitanjali J Angmo Calls for Protecting Students' Rights Amid Protests
item.description: Gitanjali J Angmo, wife of activist Sonam Wangchuk, expressed deep concern over the negative portrayal of students involved in peaceful protests against the 'Sansad Chalo' march. She criticized the me...

item.title: Nigeria's Energy Leadership Fellowship Launches to Empower Youth
item.description: Dr. Mustapha Abdullahi, Director-General of Nigeria's Energy Commission, launched the Mustapha Abdullahi Energy Leadership Fellowship (MAELF) 2026, a week-long program to train over 80 young Nigerians...

item.title: Cough remedies effectiveness and when to seek medical help
item.description: Coughs are often a symptom of viral infections and typically resolve on their own without treatment. However, many people turn to lozenges, syrups, or medicated hot drinks for relief. Research indicat...

item.description: The article discusses a celebrity's recollection of their first meeting with Jacob Elordi, a billionaire associated with Tesla. It highlights the incident where Elordi broke both of his heels in a bad...

item.title: Global passport rankings reveal widening differences in international travel freedom
item.description: The article examines how the strength of passports varies across the world and what these differences reveal about global inequality, diplomacy and changing geopolitical relationships. Passport streng...

item.title: Niger's Military Junta Intensifies Human Rights Abuses
item.description: The article details how Niger's military junta, which seized power in 2023, has entrenched authoritarianism by dismantling democratic institutions and escalating repression. Key actions include dissol...

item.title: Kenyans Face Higher Fuel and Electricity Costs as Global Oil Prices Surge Past KSh 14k a Barrel
item.description: Global oil prices have surged past KSh 14,500 per barrel, causing Kenyan consumers to face higher fuel and electricity costs. Murban crude, Kenya's benchmark for oil imports, rose over 22% to $112 per...
